text: Lord, help me never live as though You are not present. Keep my heart grounded in faith, wisdom, and reverence for You.
Father, search my heart and draw me closer to You. Help me seek You sincerely and live with understanding that comes from Your truth.
Lord, I acknowledge my need for Your grace. Forgive me when I fall short and lead me back into righteousness.
Father, protect me from spiritual blindness and from actions that harm others. Teach me to walk in compassion, humility, and obedience.
Lord, when fear rises suddenly, remind me that You are with Your people and that Your presence is greater than every threat.
Father, thank You for the salvation and restoration You provide. Fill my heart with joy as I trust in Your deliverance and faithfulness.
